{{Infobox character
| name = Silver Heart
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Silver Heart]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Silver Heart]] is a [[construct]] created by the [[Sculpt the Soul]] technique.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Silver Heart]] is an entity whose access can be denied by the [[Silent Sage]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“Frozen Blade and Silver Heart,” Underlady Li Min Redflower put in, her voice creaking behind her dark veil.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
